panels.title: Rolling vs Completed MV and Income Gap

targets.queryText: WITH types AS (SELECT 'WEEK' AS period_type UNION ALL SELECT 'MONTH' UNION ALL SELECT 'QUARTER' UNION ALL SELECT 'YEAR'), r AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date, mv_delta, monthly_income_delta, twr_period_pct, ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=1), c AS (SELECT ps.period_type, ps.period_start_date, ps.period_end_date, ps.mv_delta, ps.monthly_income_delta, ps.twr_period_pct, ps.ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary ps JOIN (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) lc ON lc.period_type=ps.period_type AND lc.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date), g AS (SELECT t.period_type, COALESCE(r.period_end_date, c.period_end_date) AS period_end_date, COALESCE(r.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(r.period_end_date,'') AS rolling_range, COALESCE(c.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(c.period_end_date,'') AS completed_range, r.mv_delta - c.mv_delta AS mv_gap, r.monthly_income_delta - c.monthly_income_delta AS income_gap, r.twr_period_pct - c.twr_period_pct AS twr_gap, r.ltv_pct_delta - c.ltv_pct_delta AS ltv_gap FROM types t LEFT JOIN r ON r.period_type=t.period_type LEFT JOIN c ON c.period_type=t.period_type) SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN mv_gap END AS W_MVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN mv_gap END AS M_MVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN mv_gap END AS Q_MVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN mv_gap END AS Y_MVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN income_gap END AS W_IncGap, CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN income_gap END AS M_IncGap, CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN income_gap END AS Q_IncGap, CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN income_gap END AS Y_IncGap FROM g ORDER BY period_end_date, period_type
targets.rawQueryText: WITH types AS (SELECT 'WEEK' AS period_type UNION ALL SELECT 'MONTH' UNION ALL SELECT 'QUARTER' UNION ALL SELECT 'YEAR'), r AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date, mv_delta, monthly_income_delta, twr_period_pct, ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=1), c AS (SELECT ps.period_type, ps.period_start_date, ps.period_end_date, ps.mv_delta, ps.monthly_income_delta, ps.twr_period_pct, ps.ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary ps JOIN (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) lc ON lc.period_type=ps.period_type AND lc.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date), g AS (SELECT t.period_type, COALESCE(r.period_end_date, c.period_end_date) AS period_end_date, COALESCE(r.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(r.period_end_date,'') AS rolling_range, COALESCE(c.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(c.period_end_date,'') AS completed_range, r.mv_delta - c.mv_delta AS mv_gap, r.monthly_income_delta - c.monthly_income_delta AS income_gap, r.twr_period_pct - c.twr_period_pct AS twr_gap, r.ltv_pct_delta - c.ltv_pct_delta AS ltv_gap FROM types t LEFT JOIN r ON r.period_type=t.period_type LEFT JOIN c ON c.period_type=t.period_type) SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN mv_gap END AS W_MVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN mv_gap END AS M_MVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN mv_gap END AS Q_MVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN mv_gap END AS Y_MVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN income_gap END AS W_IncGap, CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN income_gap END AS M_IncGap, CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN income_gap END AS Q_IncGap, CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN income_gap END AS Y_IncGap FROM g ORDER BY period_end_date, period_type

panels.title: Rolling vs Completed TWR and LTV Gap

targets.queryText: WITH types AS (SELECT 'WEEK' AS period_type UNION ALL SELECT 'MONTH' UNION ALL SELECT 'QUARTER' UNION ALL SELECT 'YEAR'), r AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date, mv_delta, monthly_income_delta, twr_period_pct, ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=1), c AS (SELECT ps.period_type, ps.period_start_date, ps.period_end_date, ps.mv_delta, ps.monthly_income_delta, ps.twr_period_pct, ps.ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary ps JOIN (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) lc ON lc.period_type=ps.period_type AND lc.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date), g AS (SELECT t.period_type, COALESCE(r.period_end_date, c.period_end_date) AS period_end_date, COALESCE(r.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(r.period_end_date,'') AS rolling_range, COALESCE(c.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(c.period_end_date,'') AS completed_range, r.mv_delta - c.mv_delta AS mv_gap, r.monthly_income_delta - c.monthly_income_delta AS income_gap, r.twr_period_pct - c.twr_period_pct AS twr_gap, r.ltv_pct_delta - c.ltv_pct_delta AS ltv_gap FROM types t LEFT JOIN r ON r.period_type=t.period_type LEFT JOIN c ON c.period_type=t.period_type) SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN twr_gap END AS W_TWRGap, CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN twr_gap END AS M_TWRGap, CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN twr_gap END AS Q_TWRGap, CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN twr_gap END AS Y_TWRGap, CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN ltv_gap END AS W_LTVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN ltv_gap END AS M_LTVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN ltv_gap END AS Q_LTVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN ltv_gap END AS Y_LTVGap FROM g ORDER BY period_end_date, period_type
targets.rawQueryText: WITH types AS (SELECT 'WEEK' AS period_type UNION ALL SELECT 'MONTH' UNION ALL SELECT 'QUARTER' UNION ALL SELECT 'YEAR'), r AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date, mv_delta, monthly_income_delta, twr_period_pct, ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=1), c AS (SELECT ps.period_type, ps.period_start_date, ps.period_end_date, ps.mv_delta, ps.monthly_income_delta, ps.twr_period_pct, ps.ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary ps JOIN (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) lc ON lc.period_type=ps.period_type AND lc.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date), g AS (SELECT t.period_type, COALESCE(r.period_end_date, c.period_end_date) AS period_end_date, COALESCE(r.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(r.period_end_date,'') AS rolling_range, COALESCE(c.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(c.period_end_date,'') AS completed_range, r.mv_delta - c.mv_delta AS mv_gap, r.monthly_income_delta - c.monthly_income_delta AS income_gap, r.twr_period_pct - c.twr_period_pct AS twr_gap, r.ltv_pct_delta - c.ltv_pct_delta AS ltv_gap FROM types t LEFT JOIN r ON r.period_type=t.period_type LEFT JOIN c ON c.period_type=t.period_type) SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN twr_gap END AS W_TWRGap, CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN twr_gap END AS M_TWRGap, CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN twr_gap END AS Q_TWRGap, CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN twr_gap END AS Y_TWRGap, CASE WHEN period_type='WEEK' THEN ltv_gap END AS W_LTVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='MONTH' THEN ltv_gap END AS M_LTVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='QUARTER' THEN ltv_gap END AS Q_LTVGap, CASE WHEN period_type='YEAR' THEN ltv_gap END AS Y_LTVGap FROM g ORDER BY period_end_date, period_type

targets.queryText: WITH types AS (SELECT 'WEEK' AS period_type UNION ALL SELECT 'MONTH' UNION ALL SELECT 'QUARTER' UNION ALL SELECT 'YEAR'), r AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date, mv_delta, monthly_income_delta, twr_period_pct, ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=1), c AS (SELECT ps.period_type, ps.period_start_date, ps.period_end_date, ps.mv_delta, ps.monthly_income_delta, ps.twr_period_pct, ps.ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary ps JOIN (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) lc ON lc.period_type=ps.period_type AND lc.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date), g AS (SELECT t.period_type, COALESCE(r.period_end_date, c.period_end_date) AS period_end_date, COALESCE(r.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(r.period_end_date,'') AS rolling_range, COALESCE(c.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(c.period_end_date,'') AS completed_range, r.mv_delta - c.mv_delta AS mv_gap, r.monthly_income_delta - c.monthly_income_delta AS income_gap, r.twr_period_pct - c.twr_period_pct AS twr_gap, r.ltv_pct_delta - c.ltv_pct_delta AS ltv_gap FROM types t LEFT JOIN r ON r.period_type=t.period_type LEFT JOIN c ON c.period_type=t.period_type) SELECT period_type AS PType, round(mv_gap,2) AS MVGap, round(income_gap,2) AS IncGap, round(twr_gap,2) AS TWRGap FROM g ORDER BY CASE period_type WHEN 'WEEK' THEN 1 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN 2 WHEN 'QUARTER' THEN 3 WHEN 'YEAR' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH types AS (SELECT 'WEEK' AS period_type UNION ALL SELECT 'MONTH' UNION ALL SELECT 'QUARTER' UNION ALL SELECT 'YEAR'), r AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date, mv_delta, monthly_income_delta, twr_period_pct, ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=1), c AS (SELECT ps.period_type, ps.period_start_date, ps.period_end_date, ps.mv_delta, ps.monthly_income_delta, ps.twr_period_pct, ps.ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary ps JOIN (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) lc ON lc.period_type=ps.period_type AND lc.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date), g AS (SELECT t.period_type, COALESCE(r.period_end_date, c.period_end_date) AS period_end_date, COALESCE(r.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(r.period_end_date,'') AS rolling_range, COALESCE(c.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(c.period_end_date,'') AS completed_range, r.mv_delta - c.mv_delta AS mv_gap, r.monthly_income_delta - c.monthly_income_delta AS income_gap, r.twr_period_pct - c.twr_period_pct AS twr_gap, r.ltv_pct_delta - c.ltv_pct_delta AS ltv_gap FROM types t LEFT JOIN r ON r.period_type=t.period_type LEFT JOIN c ON c.period_type=t.period_type) SELECT period_type AS PType, round(mv_gap,2) AS MVGap, round(income_gap,2) AS IncGap, round(twr_gap,2) AS TWRGap FROM g ORDER BY CASE period_type WHEN 'WEEK' THEN 1 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN 2 WHEN 'QUARTER' THEN 3 WHEN 'YEAR' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: WITH types AS (SELECT 'WEEK' AS period_type UNION ALL SELECT 'MONTH' UNION ALL SELECT 'QUARTER' UNION ALL SELECT 'YEAR'), r AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date, mv_delta, monthly_income_delta, twr_period_pct, ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=1), c AS (SELECT ps.period_type, ps.period_start_date, ps.period_end_date, ps.mv_delta, ps.monthly_income_delta, ps.twr_period_pct, ps.ltv_pct_delta FROM period_summary ps JOIN (SELECT period_type, MAX(period_end_date) AS period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 GROUP BY period_type) lc ON lc.period_type=ps.period_type AND lc.period_end_date=ps.period_end_date), g AS (SELECT t.period_type, COALESCE(r.period_end_date, c.period_end_date) AS period_end_date, COALESCE(r.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(r.period_end_date,'') AS rolling_range, COALESCE(c.period_start_date,'') || '..' || COALESCE(c.period_end_date,'') AS completed_range, r.mv_delta - c.mv_delta AS mv_gap, r.monthly_income_delta - c.monthly_income_delta AS income_gap, r.twr_period_pct - c.twr_period_pct AS twr_gap, r.ltv_pct_delta - c.ltv_pct_delta AS ltv_gap FROM types t LEFT JOIN r ON r.period_type=t.period_type LEFT JOIN c ON c.period_type=t.period_type) SELECT period_type AS PType, round(ltv_gap,2) AS LTVGap, substr(rolling_range,1,24) AS Rolling, substr(completed_range,1,24) AS Completed FROM g ORDER BY CASE period_type WHEN 'WEEK' THEN 1 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN 2 WHEN 'QUARTER' THEN 3 WHEN 'YEAR' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5

title: D06 LMI v3 - Rolling vs Completed Gap
